channel.title: Space Suit on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Space Suit on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Solway Firth Spaceman: The Enigmatic Figure in Jim Templeton's Photograph
item.description:
The Solway Firth Spaceman refers to a figure in a photograph taken on May 23, 1964, by Jim Templeton. Templeton claimed the figure, appearing in a spacesuit, was not visible when he took the picture. Journalist David Clarke suggested the figure was Templeton’s wife, whose blue dress was overexposed to appear white. Despite Templeton’s insistence on the photo’s authenticity, analysts confirmed it was genuine, and the figure has been widely debated by ufologists and paranormal investigators.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Solway_Firth_Spaceman
